description_long: This is a heavily weathered, black metal barrel with a cylindrical shape and visible dents and deformations along its body, suggesting extensive use or rough handling. The surface is marred with patches of rust, scratches, and grime, giving it a distinctly aged and industrial appearance. A prominent circular opening with a metallic rim is present near the top on one side, likely for filling or emptying contents. One side of the barrel features a large, faded fleur-de-lis symbol, adding a unique visual detail and hinting at possible repurposing or branding. The top and bottom edges are reinforced with raised bands, and the overall structure appears robust and capable of withstanding significant impact. The interior is not visible, but the object is likely hollow and designed to contain liquids or materials.
description: A battered, black metal barrel with dents, rust patches, and a circular opening near the top. It features a faded fleur-de-lis symbol and reinforced bands.
description_view_0: This view shows the barrel's circular opening near the top and highlights the dents and surface wear.
description_view_1: This view displays the large, faded fleur-de-lis symbol and more of the barrel's weathered texture.
description_view_2: This side reveals a mostly plain, dark surface with some scratches and partial view of the fleur-de-lis.
description_view_3: This view shows the back of the barrel, emphasizing the reinforced bands and overall battered condition.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal reinforcement bands at top and bottom
